meta.name: Events
meta.description: Stores representations of real-world events, timelines, and occurrences derived from external sources.
invariants: Events must be grounded in verifiable external sources.
Temporal data (start, end, duration) must be explicit.
Events must be distinguished from the narratives describing them.
Causal links to other events must be explicitly modeled.
Event symbols must not be silently mutated; updates reflect new evidence.
